opportunity_summary: Europe's FIRST exascale supercomputer. 1 ExaFLOP. EUR 500M total budget (EUR 273M hardware, EUR 227M power/cooling/ops). Eviden BullSequana XH3000 with direct liquid cooling (warm water). Waste heat integrated into Julich campus heating network. NVIDIA GPU-accelerated BOOSTER partition. #4 on TOP500, most energy-efficient exascale worldwide. EnEfG compliant by design.
confidence_reason: EuroHPC JU official site, Forschungszentrum Julich, NVIDIA, and HPCwire confirm exascale, DLC warm water, EUR 500M budget, waste heat reuse, Sep 2025 inauguration.
source_1_title: JUPITER Officially Propels Europe into the Exascale Era
source_1_evidence_snippet: JUPITER inaugurated, 1 ExaFLOP, #4 TOP500, most energy-efficient exascale worldwide.
source_2_title: JUPITER - Exascale for Europe
source_2_evidence_snippet: BullSequana XH3000 direct liquid cooled. Warm-water cooling, waste heat integrated into campus heating network. EUR 500M total budget.
notes: Europe's first exascale. BOOSTER partition is NVIDIA GPU-accelerated (63+ GFLOPS/watt). BullSequana XH3000 DLC architecture. Waste heat heats campus buildings. Total EUR 500M: EUR 273M hardware + EUR 227M power/cooling/ops. Germany's EnEfG requires PUE <=1.2 for new DCs from July 2026 - JUPITER compliant by design. ECMWF weather/climate workloads.
heat_recovery_details: Warm-water cooling waste heat integrated into Julich campus heating network
pipeline_evidence_snippet: Europe's first exascale, 1 ExaFLOP, inaugurated Sep 2025, DLC, waste heat reuse

opportunity_summary: PUE 1.1242 (TUV SUD certified -- best ever recorded by TUV SUD). Direct free cooling, 92% of all cooling via outside air. Cold-aisle containment. No water cooling, no liquid cooling. 5 data centers in Nuremberg park. Hetzner also operates Falkenstein park (PUE 1.1242 certified there too). EnEfG compliant well ahead of deadlines.
confidence_reason: Hetzner official site and TUV SUD certification confirm PUE 1.1242, direct free cooling, 92% outside air, cold-aisle containment. No liquid cooling.
source_1_title: More sustainable data center by Hetzner efficiency
source_1_evidence_snippet: PUE 1.1242, best ever by TUV SUD. Direct free cooling, 92% from outside air. No water cooling.
source_2_title: Hetzner Data Center Park Nuremberg
source_2_evidence_snippet: 5 data centers, Sigmundstrasse 135 Nuremberg, cold-aisle containment.
notes: Hetzner achieves exceptional PUE purely through air cooling + German climate + cold-aisle containment. No liquid cooling at all. This sets a benchmark for air-only efficiency. Hetzner also operates in Falkenstein (same PUE) and Helsinki. Primarily a hosting/IaaS provider, not colocation.
pipeline_evidence_snippet: PUE 1.1242, TUV SUD certified, direct free cooling 92%

full_address: Agriport Business Park, Middenmeer, Noord-Holland, Netherlands
opportunity_summary: EUR 2B investment. Two buildings (AMS13 + AMS14) with 5 data halls each on 14.4-hectare site. Estimated PUE 1.18 via direct air + evaporative cooling. Bypassed NL moratorium via pre-2016 plans and separate permits per tower. Construction Jan 2026, operational 2028. NL DCs = 5% national energy. Part of Microsoft's 200+ EU DC expansion by end 2026.
confidence_reason: DutchNews, DCD, NL Times confirm EUR 2B, AMS13/14, 14.4ha, PUE 1.18, direct air+evaporative, Jan 2026 construction start, 2028 operational.

source_2_title: Microsoft to Build Massive Data Centre in Amsterdam Despite Bans
source_2_evidence_snippet: Bypassed moratorium via pre-2016 plans. Separate permits per tower. PUE 1.18, direct air + evaporative cooling.
permits_or_filings_found: Permits pre-dated moratorium; separate permits issued per building by Noord-Holland province
notes: Key moratorium bypass case study. At least 7 hyperscale DCs moving forward despite NL moratorium because permits pre-dated restrictions. NL DCs now ~5% of national energy. Microsoft globally deploying closed-loop zero-water evaporation as default for new DCs since Aug 2024, but this Amsterdam project uses evaporative cooling. Political controversy ongoing.
